'''Vine cats''' were [[Feline/Legends|felinoid]] [[Reptomammal/Legends|reptomammals]] found in the outlying portions of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] and the forests of [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]]. They came in half a dozen species, and their skin was used to make leather.

==Biology and appearance==
Vine cats were large predators that, because of their large size, had to eat often. Fortunately for them, they were highly developed hunters, using their long, heavy tails to balance. They also had razor like claws, with which they able to quickly [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismember]] their prey. They were capable of easily scaling steep cliffs, trees, and other near-vertical objects.

==History==
[[File:Vine_cats.png|thumb|right|Juvenile vine cats with an adult cat]]
By the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], many vine cats inhabited the jungles on Dromund Kaas, imported from [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]], more notably the ones around [[Kaas City]]. The creatures eventually began attacking Imperial personnel, ending with Sergeant [[Molcarrus]] issuing a bounty for anyone willing to hunt down the beasts. In due time, they were contained once again. Other types of vine cats resided on Ziost and [[Taral V]].

A trained vine cat mount that had been smuggled onto [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shadaa]] during the [[Third Galactic War]] could be won by attendees to the [[Star Cluster Casino|Star Cluster]] and [[Club Vertica Casino]]s.<ref name="TOR:NSN">{{TORcite|exp=lots|type=event|Nar Shaddaa Nightlife}}</ref>
